cases.title: Collect requirements for a small queue admission feature
cases.prompt: Create requirements for a small service that admits users into a waiting queue and blocks admission when capacity is full. Ask only unresolved product questions before writing docs/design/requirements.md.

cases.title: Generate one runtime-ready use-case slice
cases.prompt: From confirmed waiting queue requirements and context language, create exactly one external-actor use case slice for entering the waiting queue.

cases.title: Derive event storming only for selected use-case slice
cases.prompt: Use docs/use-cases/UC-001/use-case.md as the primary source and write event storming for the selected waiting queue entry use case only.

cases.title: Design DDD components without generating runtime code
cases.prompt: From the selected UC-001 event storming artifact, design aggregates, entities, value objects, domain services, and application services without editing runtime code.

cases.title: Record implementation decisions for queue admission
cases.prompt: Use the UC-001 DDD design to decide retry, idempotency, transaction boundary, observability, and adapter strategy for queue admission.

cases.title: Create an executor-ready plan for one work item
cases.prompt: Create a plan only for UC-001 using the active ChangeSet and selected use-case slice. Do not implement runtime code.

cases.title: Execute one use-case plan and record verification
cases.prompt: Execute only docs/plans/active/UC-001/plan.md, keep changes inside its allowed files, and record verification commands with results in the plan.
